positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of constellations and celestial elements, featuring geometric outlines of zodiac signs and flowing cosmic dust trails. The main subject is a central, stylized lunar crescent framed by interlocking constellations. Use a dark navy blue and deep teal color palette contrasted with brilliant metallic gold and faint nebula magenta highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Deco poster design and scientific illustration, ensuring clean, high-contrast silhouettes and crisp line work suitable for screen printing. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed to occupy the entirety of the print area, emphasizing strong negative space.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, logo, text, signature, watermark, copyright, messy, artifacts, blur, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts
